title: vLLM Production Stack with LMCache KV Offloading

questions.question: What problem does LMCache primarily address in a vLLM deployment?
options: KV cache pressure in HBM causing preemption and re-prefill of the same prefixes
questions.question_zh: LMCache 在 vLLM 部署中主要解决什么问题？
options_zh: HBM 中 KV cache 压力导致抢占以及对相同前缀的重复 prefill
Tokenizer 的 GIL 争用
网络出口过滤
冷启动时拉镜像

questions.question: What vLLM API introduced pluggable KV cache backends?
questions.question_zh: vLLM 中哪个 API 引入了可插拔的 KV cache backend？
options_zh: Prefix-caching 标志
PagedAttention v2
vLLM v0.9.0 中的 Connector API
ChunkedPrefill API

questions.question: What does the vLLM 0.11.0 (January 2026) release add to the KV offload path?
options: An asynchronous offload path so the engine does not block on offload in the common case
questions.question_zh: vLLM 0.11.0（2026 年 1 月）在 KV offload 路径上加了什么？
options_zh: 异步 offload 路径，让常见情况下引擎不会因 offload 阻塞
仅同步的 offload
强制 FP8 KV cache
移除了 LMCache 支持

questions.question: When should you pick LMCache over native CPU offload?
options: When multiple engines share prefixes across tenants, LoRA variants, or repeated RAG context, so cross-engine reuse pays
When you want to disable KV caching entirely
When a single engine has HBM pressure and no prefix sharing
When you are running on CPU only
questions.question_zh: 什么时候应该选 LMCache 而不是原生 CPU offload？
options_zh: 当多个引擎跨租户、LoRA 变体或重复 RAG 上下文共享前缀，跨引擎复用就划算
当你想完全关掉 KV 缓存时
当单个引擎 HBM 紧张且没有前缀共享时
只在 CPU 上运行时

questions.question: What happens to LMCache benefit when KV footprint stays well below HBM?
options: Configs match baseline with roughly 3-5% overhead and no real benefit
questions.question_zh: 当 KV 占用一直明显低于 HBM 时，LMCache 的收益会怎样？
options_zh: LMCache 会自动禁用
仍然让吞吐翻倍
配置和 baseline 相比大致只多 3-5% 的开销，没有真正收益
引擎崩溃

questions.question: Why does LMCache compose with disaggregated serving (Phase 17 · 17)?
options: KV transferred from prefill to decode lands in LMCache; later queries can pull from LMCache and skip prefill, so the cache-aware router can pick an engine whose local or LMCache-shared cache matches
Because LMCache runs on the same GPU as the engine
It does not — they are mutually exclusive
questions.question_zh: LMCache 为什么能与 disaggregated 服务（Phase 17 · 17）组合起来？
options_zh: 因为 LMCache 替代了 NIXL
从 prefill 传到 decode 的 KV 落到 LMCache 中；后续查询可以从 LMCache 拉取并跳过 prefill，cache-aware 路由器因此可以挑一台本地或 LMCache 共享缓存命中的引擎
因为 LMCache 跑在和引擎相同的 GPU 上
组合不起来 —— 它们互斥
